## Validation

- [ ] Repository-facing documentation affected by this change is updated in English
- [ ] Validation workflows are green
- [ ] Schema or contract validation is green
- [ ] Coverage or executable test requirements remain satisfied where this repository exposes a testable code surface
- [ ] Required CI workflows remain blocking, not advisory
- [ ] Downstream SDK or service consumers are documented when contracts changed
